label: DevOps / SRE
screening_questions: How do you handle a P1 outage?
How do you troubleshoot Kubernetes pod restarts?
How do you improve deployment reliability?

label: Software Developer
screening_questions: How do you debug a production API issue?
How do you approach system design?
How do you write maintainable code?

label: QA Engineer / Test Automation
screening_questions: How do you design test automation?
How do you handle flaky tests?
How do you decide release readiness?

label: Data Engineer
screening_questions: How do you troubleshoot a failing data pipeline?
How do you ensure data quality?
How do you handle schema changes?

label: Data Analyst
screening_questions: How do you build a useful dashboard?
What do you do when numbers look wrong?
How do you define a metric?

label: Business Analyst
screening_questions: How do you gather requirements?
How do you handle scope changes?
How do you support UAT?

label: Project Manager
screening_questions: How do you manage project risk?
How do you handle delivery delays?
How do you manage conflict between teams?

label: Product Manager
screening_questions: How do you prioritize a backlog?
What do you do when a feature underperforms?
How do you define success metrics?

label: Cybersecurity Analyst
screening_questions: How do you investigate a security alert?
How do you prioritize vulnerabilities?
How do you handle suspicious login activity?

label: Cloud Engineer
screening_questions: How do you design a secure cloud environment?
How do you control cloud cost?
How do you troubleshoot cloud connectivity?

label: Database Administrator
screening_questions: How do you troubleshoot a slow query?
How do you validate backups?
How do you respond to database connection exhaustion?
